item.title: 3 signs you have brainrot: - 2x speed feels normal - You can't eat without a screen - Your phone is the first thing you grab every morning If that's you, it might be time for some accountability. #brainrot #doomscrolling #screenaddiction #scrollbuddy #foc
item.description: By @scrollbuddyapp: 3 signs you have brainrot: - 2x speed feels normal - You can't eat without a screen - Your phone is the first thing you grab every morning If that's you, it might be time for some accountability. #brainrot #doomscrolling #screenaddiction #scrollbuddy #foc

item.title: She gave nothing back. Part 2 drops soon — will he confront her? 👀 CTA: Drop a 🍑 if you saw this coming. Drop a 🍋 if you feel his pain. He worked double shifts just to pay for her surgery… and THIS is what she did with it 💀🍑 Comment "Part 2" if you want
item.description: By @minecraftanimation182: She gave nothing back. Part 2 drops soon — will he confront her? 👀 CTA: Drop a 🍑 if you saw this coming. Drop a 🍋 if you feel his pain. He worked double shifts just to pay for her surgery… and THIS is what she did with it 💀🍑 Comment "Part 2" if you want
